description: Desktop app to generate Unity assets using AI (Tauri + FastAPI)
name: unity-generator

scripts.clean: pnpm run clean:backend && pnpm run clean:frontend
scripts.lint:frontend: pnpm --dir backend lint && pnpm --dir frontend lint
scripts.lint:frontend:fix: pnpm --dir backend lint:fix && pnpm --dir frontend lint
scripts.package: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build:backend && pnpm run tauri:build
scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm --dir frontend install && pip install -r backend/requirements.txt
scripts.test:all: pnpm run test:backend && pnpm run test:frontend
scripts.typecheck:frontend: pnpm --dir backend typecheck && pnpm --dir frontend typecheck
scripts.typecheck:all: pnpm run typecheck:backend && pnpm run typecheck:frontend
